sentence: 他们俩平分家务，从不吵架。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎ píngfēn jiāwù, cóng bù chǎojià.
english: The two of them split the housework evenly and never argue.

sentence: 他骑摩托上下班，省时又省钱。
pinyin: Tā qí mótuō shàngxiàbān, shěng shí yòu shěng qián.
english: He rides a motorbike to work, saving time and money.

sentence: 政府加强了对食品安全的管控。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ jiāqiángle duì shípǐn ānquán de guǎnkòng.
english: The government has tightened its control over food safety.

sentence: 他服刑三年后终于获释了。
pinyin: Tā fúxíng sān nián hòu zhōngyú huòshì le.
english: He was finally freed after serving three years in prison.

sentence: 他爬上树后发现自己下不来了。
pinyin: Tā pá shàng shù hòu fāxiàn zìjǐ xià bu lái le.
english: After climbing the tree, he found he couldn't get back down.
